name: Shielded X
official_rules_text: A unit with the Shielded X keyword has X Shield tokens. Shield tokens belong to the unit and are not assigned to individual miniatures. If a unit gains the Shielded X keyword, it gains X REGENERATE X When a unit with the Regenerate X keyword ends its Activation, it rolls 1 white defense die for each Wound token it has, up to X. For each d or e result, it removes 1 Wound token.
